title: White House rejects latest Iranian offer as Pakistan peace talks fail
snippet: White House formally rejected Iran's latest peace proposal. Trump: 'they offered a lot but not enough'. Iran 5-point counter-proposal called 'unrealistic'. Includes end to attacks, security guarantees, war reparations, sovereignty over Hormuz. Trump rejects and says war will 'come to an end very soon'.
tag_reason: New: formal rejection of latest Iranian offer + war ending soon claim
